{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 956 (SB 956) enables K-12 school districts to expedite the construction of new on-campus facilities.",
    "SB 956 encourages greater collaboration between architects, engineers, and contractors through a concurrent, single contract.",
    "The design-build process has proven to be an effective tool in expediting the construction and completion of on-campus infrastructure projects.",
    "The design-build process supports safety and learning for students.",
    "SB 956 makes the design-build process a permanent option for school districts.",
    "In recent years, design-build has helped schools navigate double-digit construction cost increases."
  ]
